items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the specific need for a mini booking interface within Instagram/Facebook. However, the evidence provided does not include any direct confirmation of this interface being implemented or validated in the current saga run. The linked use case mentions the need for this interface but does not provide concrete evidence that it has been implemented or validated, leading to an inconclusive status.
